name: collapsible
description: A single trigger that expands/collapses one content region. Server-first WIRE component (ADR-0012): open state lives in typed Java, the server re-renders, the client morphs. Replaces the <lv-collapsible> Lit island. WAI-ARIA APG disclosure (button[aria-expanded] + region[aria-labelledby]).
docs: Register CollapsibleComponent as a PROTOTYPE-scoped @Bean (a fresh instance per stateless wire call). Render it via the wire mount/`@template.lievit.collapsible(...)`; pass the panel body as the `content` slot (an @`...` block). The `@LievitComponent(template="lievit/collapsible")` name assumes the .jte landed at your JTE root under lievit/; adjust the package + template name freely once copied (the source is yours).
